group.name: SA Legal — Matter Details
group.description: South African legal-specific fields for matter (project) entities

fields.name: Case Number
fields.description: Court-assigned case number for the matter

fields.name: Court
fields.description: Name of the court in which the matter is heard

fields.name: Opposing Party
fields.description: Name of the primary opposing party

fields.name: Opposing Attorney
fields.description: Name of the opposing attorney or firm

fields.name: Advocate
fields.description: Name of the instructed advocate (if briefed)

fields.name: Date of Instruction
fields.description: Date on which the firm was instructed on the matter

fields.name: Estimated Value
fields.description: Estimated monetary value of the claim or matter
